matchedGroups.title: Bootstrap target entry module
requiredBehaviors: Target project exists with a valid entry module and correct root package.
App metadata aligns with source identity and startup resources.
riskHints: Do not leave the target in a rootless or placeholder package state.
Keep ability shell thin so later logic lands in domain features instead of the entry file.
acceptanceEvidence: Build gate passes for phase-01-project-skeleton-resources.
entry/cjpm.toml and module metadata exist under Foodike-Harmony.
uiContracts: single entry ability launching the app shell
dataContracts: none in phase 1 beyond package/module wiring

matchedGroups.title: Migrate strings, colors, and media
requiredBehaviors: All source strings have target resource keys.
Referenced card, icon, and onboarding media are available in target resources.
riskHints: Resource shrinkage is currently total; do not postpone the base catalog beyond phase 1.
Vector and adaptive-icon assets may need conversion instead of direct copying.
acceptanceEvidence: Target string and media resources exist and are referenced by planned target pages.
No phase-1 code references missing resource keys.

coordinationNotes: Prefer extending existing route/navigation/state surfaces over creating parallel shells.
If a shared surface must change, keep the change minimal and update only evidence rows tied to this group.
